name: weside-companion
description: Materialize your weside Companion in Claude Code

companion.title: Companion Name
companion.description: Name of your Companion (e.g. 'Nox'). Leave empty for your last active Companion.

autoMaterialize.title: Auto-load at Session Start
autoMaterialize.description: Automatically load your Companion's identity at the start of every Claude Code session. Enable: true | Disable: false
